description.value: Price 51,000 gp; Slot none; CL 13th; Weight 5 lbs.; Aura strong varies DESCRIPTION This length of aged ivory is carved with numerous hunting scenes which seem to animate and tell a story when the staff is rotated. It allows the use of the following spells: Acute senses (1 charge) Bard’s escape (4 charges) Locate creature (2 charges) Unwilling shield (3 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells acute senses, bard’s escape, locate creature, unwilling shield; Cost 25,500 gp
